calendar.matters:
Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Jul-31-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Ivy Tseng, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Third and Mission Associates, LLC.
Kathleen Thompson, Assistant Property Manager for plaintiff, was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defendants David Replogle or Alex Nguyen, a/k/a Anh Nguyen.
Defaults entered against defendant on May 21, 2008.
Doe defendants were dismissed on June 9, 2008.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Third and Mission Associates, LLC, and against the Defaulted Defendants David Replogle and Alex Nguyen, a/k/a Anh Nguyen as follows:

Damages/Rent - $41,040.77.
Costs - $440.00, for a total in the amount of $41,480.77.

Plaintiff is entitled to restitution and possession of the premises located at 680 Mission Street, #38C, San Francisco, CA. The lease is forfeited.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
